---
title: "About the Team"
title-block-banner: "#0d6efd"
page-layout: full
---

::::::: team-grid
:::: team-card
![](images/bernard-liew.jpg){.team-photo}

::: team-info
<p class="team-name">

### **Dr Bernard Liew**

</p>

<p class="team-department">

Senior Lecturer in Biomechanics

</p>

<p class="team-affiliation">

University of Essex

</p>

<p class="team-bio">

Senior Lecturer in biomechanics and physiotherapy with expertise at the intersection of rehabilitation, human movement science, and machine learning.

</p>
:::
::::

:::: team-card
![](images/behnam-gholami.jpg){.team-photo}

::: team-info
<p class="team-name">

### **Behnam Gholami**

</p>

<p class="team-department">

Doctoral Researcher & Research Assistant

</p>

<p class="team-affiliation">

University of Essex

</p>

<p class="team-bio">

Behnam Gholami is a doctoral researcher in Biomechanics and Computer Vision at the University of Essex. He leverages a strong foundation in biomedical and mechanical engineering to advance research in human pose estimation.

</p>
:::
::::
:::::::

{{< include _disclaimer.qmd >}}
